candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure; labeled as total revenue and matches definition of REVT.
Financial income, not operating revenue; should not be used for top-line sales.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Represents net income available to common shareholders, not revenue.
Includes net income plus other comprehensive income; not revenue.
Represents ancillary operating income; not total revenue and should not replace top-line.
Technical balancing line; not the primary reported revenue figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Income from Operations, net
candidates.why: Balancing line for operating income, not revenue.
Represents total operating costs, not revenue.
Financial result, not operating revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Balancing item for pretax income, not revenue.
Tax expense line, not revenue.
Component of tax expense, not revenue.
Tax provision, not revenue.
Tax total, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Net Income After Tax
candidates.why: Balancing item for net income, not revenue.
Net income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Net income before extraordinary items applicable to Common
candidates.why: Balancing item; net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Net Income After Extraordinary Items applicable to Common
candidates.why: Balancing item; net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Other Comprehensive Income - Hedging Gain/Loss - Net of Tax
candidates.why: OCI component, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Tax related to other comprehensive income
candidates.why: Tax on OCI, not revenue.
Balancing line; not revenue.
OCI total, not revenue.
Balancing line; not revenue.
Net income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Diluted Net Income excluding Extra Items applicable to Common - (Company Level)
candidates.why: Adjusted net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Allocated Net Income incl Extra Items applicable to Common - (Instrument Level)
candidates.why: Instrument-level allocated net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Allocated Diluted Net Income incl Extra Items applicable to Common - (Instrument Level)
candidates.why: Instrument-level diluted net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Basic EPS - Net Income excl Extra Items applicable to Common - (Instrument Level)
candidates.why: Per-share metric, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Diluted EPS - Net Income excl Extra Items applicable to Common - (Instrument Level)
candidates.why: Per-share metric, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Diluted Net Income excluding Extra Items applicable to Common - (Instrument Level)
candidates.why: Instrument-level net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Net Income excluding Extra Items applicable to Common - (Instrument Level)
candidates.why: Instrument-level net income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Total Revenue is the clearly labeled top-line revenue figure and matches the REVT definition; other candidates are either partial (Other operating revenues) or non-revenue items.

candidates.why: Explicitly labeled cost of goods sold; matches COGS definition. Duplicate label appears but only one unique label is needed.
Personnel-related operating expenses; more appropriate for SG&A than direct COGS as a single mapped line.
General operating expenses, not specifically cost of goods sold.
Additional other operating expenses; not primary COGS line.
Specific legal/provision costs; not COGS.
Net operating expenses, includes more than COGS.
Financial item, not COGS.
Financial expense, not COGS.
Financial expenses, not COGS.
Rental cost, generally SG&A or overhead, not COGS as a whole.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not period expense COGS line.
Current asset, not COGS.
Balance sheet PPE, not COGS.
Accumulated depreciation, not COGS.
Gross PPE, not COGS.
Accrued expenses, not specifically COGS.
Generic accrued expenses; not a direct COGS line.

variables.notes: The income statement line 'Cost of goods sold' is the direct production cost corresponding to COGS; other candidates are broader operating or financial expenses.

candidates.why: This is income, not an operating expense; should not be classified as SG&A.
Represents personnel-related operating expenses, a core SG&A component.
General operating expenses that are part of SG&A/overhead.
Additional other operating expenses; also SG&A-type overhead.
Likely represents share-based compensation-related charges, which belong to SG&A overhead.

variables.notes: Selected multiple overhead expense components (personnel, other operating expenses, and share-based charges) as SG&A components while excluding income and non-overhead items.

candidates.why: Explicitly labeled research & development expense; matches XRD definition.

variables.notes: The income statement includes a line explicitly labeled 'Research & Development', which directly maps to XRD.

candidates.why: Net of interest income and expenses; use only if specific interest expense lines are missing for certain periods.
Primary gross interest expense line; best match for XINT.
Supplemental portion of interest expenses; secondary fallback for XINT if main line is missing in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; relevant component of interest expense if main interest line is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Remeasurement of previously held equity interest
candidates.why: Fair value remeasurement gain; not an interest expense.
Specific intra-group interest costs; could be interest expense but appears separate and not primary line.
Attribution of profit to NCI, not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; not interest expense.
Generic interest expense line (supplemental); useful as a fallback for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; lower-priority fallback for XINT.
Balance sheet liability; not an expense line.
Balance sheet liability; not an expense line.
Accrued but unpaid interest; not the P&L expense itself.
Accrued interest; related but not the expense recognition line.
Balance sheet liability; not an expense line.
Equity attributable to non-controlling interests; not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list favors the main gross interest expense line, then related components (rest, lease interest, supplemental), with net interest expenses as a final fallback when gross lines may be missing.

candidates.row_label: Remeasurement of previously held equity interest
candidates.why: One-off gain related to business combinations; not book equity.
Income from affiliates, not a balance sheet equity total.
Component of equity, but not total book equity; prefer total equity attributable to shareholders.
Subcomponent of paid-in equity; not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent
candidates.why: Explicitly represents equity attributable to the parent’s shareholders, excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE.
Includes both parent equity and non-controlling interests; only use if parent-only equity were unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent

variables.notes: Book equity is mapped to 'Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent' to exclude non-controlling interests, as required by the BE definition.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to NCI; not the balance sheet stock but confirms presence of NCI.
Duplicate concept label to non-controlling interests on income statement; not the equity stock.
Balance sheet line for equity attributable to non-controlling interests; best match for MIB.
Duplicate balance sheet label for non-controlling interests; same concept as MIB.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the balance sheet line 'Non-controlling interests', representing the equity attributable to non-controlling shareholders, and avoiding double-counting with parent equity.
